titleStmt.title: SII 15.687: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 687. (B.K. No. 138 of 1926-27.) HUYILGŌḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in the Māruti temple.
This is dated Śaka 1458, Durmukhi, Bhādrapada ba. 10, Sunday, corresponding to 1536 A.D., September 10.

It records the death of Badakala Nēmo-nāyaka and his two sons, the kāṇāchikāṟas of Taḷavāṟike, in a dispute over the boundary of the villages Hūligōḷa and Gāvaravāḍa. The stone was set up in memory of the deceased by Giriyapa-nāyaka another son of Nēmo-nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakhavaruṣa 1458 neya
du¨rmukhi saṁvatsarada bhādrapada bahuḷa 10 bhā
nuvāradalu hūligōḷa gāvaravāḍada sīme saṁ
vādavāgi badakala nēmonāyaka Ātana maga hoṁ
nanāyaka vobanāyaka yī mūvaru taṁma taḷavāṟike kā
ṇācikāṟarāda kāraṇa vīrasva¨rgastarādaru yida�
tiṣṭaya māḍidaṁ nēmonāyakana magana giriyapa nāyaThe stone is broken off after this.
Digital edition of SII 15.687 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
